episodes.episode_title: A Giga Battle with Mega Results!
Dream a Little Dream from Me!
The Legend of the Ninja Hero!
Performing a Pathway to the Future!
Making Friends and Influencing Villains! (The Forest's Curse and the White Bokurei!)
Championing a Research Battle! (Satoshi VS Champion Carnet! VS Mega Sirnight!!)
A Full Strength Battle Surprise! (Rival Showdown! Satoshi VS Shouta!!)
All Hail the Ice Battlefield! (Eisetsu Gym Battle! Battlefield of Ice!!)
Seeing the Forest For the Trees! (The Winding Woods...The Dawn of Evolution!!)
A Real Icebreaker! (Satoshi-Gekkouga VS Mega Yukinooh! The Giant Water Shuriken Triggers!!)
A Diamond in the Rough! (Find Melecie! Numelgon and Dedenne!!)
A Gaggle of Gadget Greatness! (The Explosive Heat at the Mechanical Festival!!)
A League of His Own! (The Kalos League Begins! The Mega Lizardon Showdown: X VS Y!!)
Valuable Experience for All! (Mega Jukain VS Raichu! Received Some Experience Points!!)
Analysis Versus Passion! (The Semifinal Full Battle! Satoshi Vs Shota!!)
A Riveting Rivalry! (Decisive Rival Battle! Satoshi-Gekkouga Vs Mega Jukain!!)
The Right Hero for the Right Job!
The First Day of the Rest of Your Life!
Facing the Needs of the Many!
The Legend of X, Y, and Z!
